Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests

Class ProcessMonitorTests

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.xprover.tests.ProcessMonitorTests
public class ProcessMonitorTests extends Object
Unit tests for class ProcessMonitor.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProcessMonitorTests()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    cancel()
    Ensures that a long running process can be cancelled.
    void
    errorFromFile()
    Ensures that the error of a monitored process can be read.
    void
    exitFailure()
    Ensures that a failed process can be monitored and the exit value retrieved.
    void
    exitSuccess()
    Ensures that a successful process can be monitored and the exit value retrieved.
    void
    friendly()
    Ensures that a long running process which is cooperative is terminated with signal SIGTERM on Unix (and simply terminated on Windows).
    void
    input()
    Ensures that the input of a monitored process is actually readable by the process.
    void
    outputFromFile()
    Ensures that the output of a monitored process can be read.
    void
    unfriendly()
    Ensures that a long running process which is not cooperative is terminated with signal SIGKILL on Unix (and simply terminated on Windows).
    void
    wrapping()
    Ensures that commands are properly wrapped on appropriate platforms.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      Ensures that a long running process which is cooperative is terminated with signal SIGTERM on Unix (and simply terminated on Windows).
      Throws:

    • unfriendly

      public void unfriendly() throws Exception
      Ensures that a long running process which is not cooperative is terminated with signal SIGKILL on Unix (and simply terminated on Windows).
